profiles.name: Rocket Launcher
profiles.keyword: Target (Ground), Indirect Fire, Long Range (18"), Sidearm, Specialist

abilities.name: Stimpack
abilities.description: This Unit suffers Non-Lethal Damage (2). This Unit gains Buff Speed (3). Additionally, its C-14 Rifle and all Close Combat Weapons gain Precision (3).

abilities.name: Combat Shield
abilities.description: This Unit is always eligible to make an Evade Roll against any Close Combat Attack targeting it and any Damage from an Enemy Special Ability.

abilities.name: Slugthrower
abilities.description: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon gains Anti-Evade (1).

abilities.name: Grenades - Frag
abilities.description: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon's S Dice is replaced by D6.

abilities.name: Stimpack
abilities.description: This Unit suffers Non-Lethal Damage (2). This Unit gains Buff Speed (3). Additionally, its Quad K12 and all Close Combat Weapons gain Precision (2).

abilities.name: Concussive Shells
abilities.description: When an Enemy declares a Charge against a Friendly Unit Within 8", that Enemy gains Debuff Speed (2).

abilities.name: Veteran of Tarsonis
abilities.description: While this Unit is Within 3" of a Mission Marker, its Armour characteristic is increased by 1.

abilities.name: Kinetic Foam
abilities.description: Increase this Unit's Hit Points characteristic by 1.

abilities.name: Laser Targeting Systems
abilities.description: This Unit's Quad K12 weapon gains Long Range (16").

abilities.name: Life Support
abilities.description: Use when another Friendly Biological Unit suffers Damage Within 4". Reduce the Total Damage before allocation by 1 for each model in this Unit that is Within 4" of the damaged Unit.

abilities.name: Restoration
abilities.description: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a Debuff. Remove all Debuffs from it.

abilities.name: Medpack
abilities.description: Select another Friendly Biological Unit Within 4". Resolve the Heal (X) effect for the targeted Unit, where X is the number of models in this Unit that are Within 4" of the target Unit.

abilities.name: Optical Flare
abilities.description: Select one Enemy Unit Within 12". Until the End of the Round, apply Debuff Range (4) to that Unit's Ranged Weapons. That Unit cannot benefit from Long Range.

abilities.name: Advanced Medic Facilities
abilities.description: This Unit's Supply Value counts as 0 when calculating the Supply Pool.

abilities.name: A-13 Flash Grenade Launcher
abilities.description: Increase the Optical Flare special ability's Range to 16".

abilities.name: Stabilizer Medpacks
abilities.description: When this Unit resolves a Life Support or Medpack ability, treat it as having 1 additional model Within Range for calculating that ability's effects.

abilities.name: Commander
abilities.description: Treat this Unit's Supply characteristic as increased by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers, completing objectives, and resolving Disengage checks.

abilities.name: Freedom Fighters
abilities.description: The Supply Value of all Friendly Units Within 8" of this Unit cannot be reduced below 1 for Contesting Mission Markers and completing objectives.

abilities.name: Orders
abilities.description:
Repeatable. Select another Friendly Biological Unit Within 8", spend CP and apply one of the following effects:
• 1CP: That Unit's first used weapon gains Critical Hit (2).
• 1CP: That Unit ignores the Disengage penalty for the remainder of the Round.
• 2CP: Remove the Activation Marker from that Unit.

abilities.name: Point Defense Laser
abilities.description: When another Friendly Unit Within 4" is targeted by a Ranged Attack without the Instant keyword, remove up to 2 dice from the Attack Pool. Then remove this Unit from the battlefield.

abilities.name: Structure
abilities.description: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 5, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.

abilities.name: Gliding
abilities.description: This model has Displacement.

abilities.name: Stimpack
abilities.description: This Unit suffers Non-Lethal Damage (2). This Unit gains Buff Speed (3). Additionally, its C-14 Rifle and all Close Combat Weapons gain Precision (3).

abilities.name: Raiders Roll
abilities.description: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve its Stimpack ability with the CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Rapid Reinforcements
abilities.description: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the Place (10) effect from another Friendly Unit. No model may be set Within 8" of any Enemy model. This Unit's Activation ends.

abilities.name: Slugthrower
abilities.description: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon gains Anti-Evade (1).

abilities.name: Grenades - Frag
abilities.description: When this Unit makes a Ranged Attack with a C-14 Rifle and the target is Within 8", that weapon's S Dice is replaced by D6.

profiles.name: Scatter Missiles
profiles.keyword: Target (Ground), Indirect Fire, Locked In (6), Long Range (24"), Sidearm

abilities.name: Target Lock
abilities.description: Select one Enemy Unit Within 12". Whenever a Friendly Goliath Unit targets that enemy with an Autocannon, that weapon Surge Type: Light, Armoured, and S Dice: D3+1.

abilities.name: Indomitable
abilities.description: While Engaged, this unit may target and be targeted by Unengaged Enemy Units. In both cases, the defending Unit gains an Evade Roll against those attacks.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (4) 3+ effect.

abilities.name: Ares-Class Targeting System
abilities.description: This Unit's Autocannon and Underbelly Machine Gun weapons gain Precision (1).

abilities.name: Squadron
abilities.description: This Unit's Horizontal Coherency is 4".

abilities.name: Lunge
abilities.description: When another Friendly Unit Within 10" is the target of a Ranged Attack, after the attack is fully resolved, this Unit, if Unengaged, may perform a Move action Directly Towards the attacking Unit.

abilities.name: Ancillary Carapace
abilities.description: This Unit gains Tough (1) on the first Armour Roll of each Activation.

abilities.name: Lurking
abilities.description: If this Unit has Stationary Status, it is eligible to make an Evade Roll against the first Ranged Attack targeting it this Round. If this Unit is On Creep, it gains +1 Modifier to this Evade Roll.

abilities.name: Burrow Ambush
abilities.description: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from the Reserves, it may resolve the Place (18) effect from the controlling player's Entry Edge. No model may be set Within 10" of any Enemy model. This Unit's Activation ends.

abilities.name: Grooved Spines
abilities.description: This Unit's Needle Spines ranged weapon gains Long Range (16").

abilities.name: Commander
abilities.description: Treat this Unit's Supply characteristic as increased by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers, completing objectives, and resolving Disengage checks.

abilities.name: Crushing Grip
abilities.description: Select one Enemy Unit Within 12". That Unit counts as Activated in this Phase (set an Activation Marker next to it).

abilities.name: Mutating Carapace
abilities.description: Select one Enemy Unit Within 18". This Unit is eligible to make an Evade Roll against all attacks made by the selected Enemy Unit, with a +2 Modifier applied to those Evade Rolls.

abilities.name: Leaping Strike
abilities.description: If Unengaged, resolve the Place (6) effect.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (4) 4+ effect.

abilities.name: Detection
abilities.description: While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Unit, they lose Hidden Status.

abilities.name: Source of Creep
abilities.description: A Friendly or Enemy Ground Zerg Unit Within 6" of this Unit, counts as being On Creep.

abilities.name: Structure
abilities.description: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 5, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.

abilities.name: Omega Network
abilities.description: The base of the Omega Worm counts as an Entry Edge. Each Round, Friendly Units with a combined Supply cost of 2 or less may be Deployed via this Entry Edge.

abilities.name: Run
abilities.description: If a Friendly Leading model finishes a Move, Disengage, or Run action in base-to-base contact with the Omega Worm, the controlling player may remove that Unit from the battlefield and return it to Reserves.

abilities.name: Squadron
abilities.description: This Unit's Horizontal Coherency is 4".

abilities.name: Raptor Strain
abilities.description: This Unit can move through Impassable Terrain of Size 4 or less and change elevation without using Access Points.

abilities.name: Leap
abilities.description: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, add 2 to the Charge Distance.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (2) 5+ effect.

abilities.name: Adrenal Overload
abilities.description: This Unit gains a +1 Modifier to all Impact Hit Rolls.

abilities.name: Spawn Creep Tumor
abilities.description: Set a Creep Tumor token in base-to-base contact with this Unit.

abilities.name: Transfusion
abilities.description: Use when another Friendly Biological Unit (including a Structure) suffers Damage Within 4". Reduce the Total Damage before allocation by 2.

abilities.name: Restoration
abilities.description: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a Debuff. Remove all Debuffs from it.

abilities.name: Psionic Link
abilities.description: Once per Round, if there are at least 7 Friendly models Within 6" of this Unit, it may resolve its Special Ability with the BM cost reduced by 1.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (4) 3+ effect.

abilities.name: Burrow
abilities.description: If this Unit is Unengaged, it gains or loses the Burrowed Status.

abilities.name: Regeneration
abilities.description: When this Unit becomes Activated, if it has the Burrowed Status, resolve the Heal (2) effect.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (2) 4+ effect.

abilities.name: Tunneling Claws
abilities.description: While this Unit has the Burrowed Status, it may perform the Move and Run actions without losing that Status. It may also move through other Units' bases.

abilities.name: Glial Reconstitution
abilities.description: This Unit gains Buff Speed (1), or Buff Speed (2) if the Unit is On Creep.

abilities.name: Burrow Ambush
abilities.description: When this Unit is nominated to deploy from the Reserves, it may resolve the Place (18) effect from the controlling player's Entry Edge. No model may be set Within 10" of any Enemy model. This Unit's Activation ends.

abilities.description: This Unit's Acid Saliva weapon gains Surge Type: Light, and S Dice: D3+1.

abilities.description: If this Unit is Unengaged, it gains or loses the Burrowed Status.

abilities.name: Roachling Infestation
abilities.description: Once Per Game. Resolve the Summon (Roachling) effect.

abilities.description: When this Unit becomes Activated, if it has the Burrowed Status, resolve the Heal (2) effect.

abilities.description: This Unit's Claws and Shredding Claws weapons gain Precision (2).

abilities.name: Zergling Reconstitution
abilities.description: If this Unit is On Creep, resolve the Respawn (3) effect, or Respawn (2) otherwise.

abilities.name: Metabolic Boost
abilities.description: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and use the higher result to add to the Unit's Speed characteristic.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (1) 5+ effect.

abilities.name: Psionic Presence
abilities.description: All Weapons of Friendly Units targeting an Enemy Unit Within 4" of this Unit's Shade token gain Precision (1).

abilities.name: Psionic Transfer
abilities.description: Set a Shade token Wholly Within 12" of any model in this Unit. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may set all models of this Unit in Coherency, treating the Shade token as the Leading Model. The Shade token has Displacement.

abilities.name: Resonating Glaives
abilities.description: This Unit's Glaive Cannon gains Buff RoA (1).

abilities.name: Guidance
abilities.description: This Unit's Glaive Cannon Ranged weapon gains Anti-Evade (2).

abilities.name: Commander
abilities.description: Treat this Unit's Supply characteristic as increased by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers, completing objectives, and resolving Disengage checks.

abilities.name: Phase Prism
abilities.description: When Artanis is nominated to deploy from Reserves, it may resolve the Place (0) effect from another Friendly Unit. That Friendly Unit is removed from the battlefield and returned to Reserves. Artanis' Activation ends.

abilities.name: Lightning Dash
abilities.description: After this Unit resolves a successful Charge action, it may declare a second Charge action against a different Enemy Unit, ignoring the restriction on Charging while Engaged. The Devastating Charge ability does not trigger a second time.

abilities.name: Hierarch's Stand
abilities.description: When another Friendly Unit Within 8" is declared as the target of a Ranged Attack and this Unit is a valid target, redirect the attack to this Unit. This Unit is eligible to make an Evade Roll against the redirected attack. This Special Ability remains active until the End of the current Activation.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (6) 4+ effect.

abilities.name: Shield Overcharge
abilities.description: This Unit gains Tough (2) on the first Armour Roll each Round.

abilities.name: Leg Enhancements
abilities.description: This Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and use the higher result to add to the Unit's Speed characteristic.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (3) 4+ effect.

abilities.name: Titan Killers
abilities.description: When this Unit makes a Close Combat Attack, and the target is Size 3 or larger, the weapon's Damage characteristic is treated as 2.

abilities.name: Precognition
abilities.description: This Unit is eligible to make an Evade roll against all attacks targeting it.

abilities.name: Khalai Ingenuity
abilities.description: Once per Round, when a Friendly Unit Within 4" of this Pylon uses a Special Ability that costs Psionic Energy, that ability's PE cost is reduced by 1.

abilities.name: Structure
abilities.description: This Unit cannot be Activated in any Phase and cannot perform actions. Additionally, its Current Supply Value is treated as 5, and it can never Control or Contest Mission Markers, ignoring the standard Zero Supply Exception. This Unit cannot be a target of an ability, unless stated otherwise.

abilities.name: Warp Conduit
abilities.description: Once per Round, the controlling player may deploy a Ground Unit from Reserves using this Pylon's base as the Entry Edge. This Unit's Activation ends.

abilities.name: Restoration
abilities.description: Use when a Friendly Unit Within 4" receives a Debuff. Remove all Debuffs from it.

abilities.name: Force Field
abilities.description: Set a Force Field token Within 8" in an unoccupied space. Units of Size 2 or lower cannot move across Force Fields. Models of Size 3 or more can move over it, and it's then removed.

abilities.name: Guardian Shield
abilities.description: All Ranged Attacks targeting a Friendly Unit Within 4" (Line of Sight is not required) are made with 1 fewer die in the Attack Pool.

abilities.name: Solid-Field Projectors
abilities.description: Set a Force Field token Within 8" in an unoccupied space. Units of Size 2 or lower cannot move across Force Fields. Models of Size 3 or more can move over it, and it's then removed.

abilities.name: Hallucination
abilities.description: When an Enemy Unit declares a Ranged Attack against a Friendly Unit Within 4", the targeted Friendly Unit is eligible to make an Evade Roll against that attack.

abilities.name: Squadron
abilities.description: This Unit's Horizontal Coherency is 4".

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.description: Resolve the Place (6) effect. Models set by this effect cannot be set up Within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit.

abilities.name: Path of Shadows
abilities.description: This Unit gains Hidden Status until it performs another action.

abilities.name: Fury of the Nerazim
abilities.description: When this Unit attacks an Enemy Unit that has already been Activated during this Phase, its Particle Disruptors gain Instant for that attack.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: When determining Charge Distance for this Unit, roll 2D6 instead of D6 and use the higher result to add to the Unit's Speed characteristic.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Immediately after this Unit completes a successful Charge, resolve the Impact (3) 4+ effect.

abilities.name: My Life for Aiur
abilities.description: When this Unit resolves Impact, each eligible model generates 1 additional Impact die.

abilities.name: Leg Enhancements
abilities.description: This Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

abilities.name: Zealous Round
abilities.description: When this Unit is not Activated and receives Damage, the controlling player may count this Unit as Activated in this Phase (flip its Activation Marker) to reduce the Total Damage by 2.

abilities.name: We Stand as One
abilities.description: When this Unit makes a Close Combat Attack, if the target is Engaged with at least 1 other Friendly Unit, this Unit's Close Combat Weapon gains Precision (2).
